raw_consumer_statement:
Fraud charge on credit card {$440.00} at XXXX. my card # stolen online. I didn't lose card. Called Citibank and filed fraud dispute. Fraud on same date for 2 charges, one for XXXX XXXX XXXX, and one XXXX XXXXXXXX was credited, XXXX being further investigated. Citibank said they mailed letter to me asking for more info and attesting to this fraud with a return to them deadline date. Since XXXX never XXXX  such letter, they reversed {$440.00}. XXXX  and made me responsible for the amt. I have called security, citbank general phone, emailed, written letters, and no one responds. 
I paid the dispute because I didnt want to be charged finance charges. Everyone I have spoken to in Security asks me the same questions, and say they are still investigating and my claim will be worked on immediately, since it has been ongoing for 6 months.
